title: Dogger Bank Teesside A / Sofia Offshore Wind Farm: non-material change, Planning Act 2008
body: "Decision by the Secretary of State on an application for a non-material change to the offshore wind farm.  Date of decision  11 November 2024  Company / location   Doggerbank Offshore Wind Farm Project 3ProjCo Limited   Type of project / consent requested  Non-material consent under the Planning Act 2008. "

taxons.title: Energy industry and infrastructure licensing and regulation
